## generateUrlDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `url` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `url` and MCP tool `generate_url`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
generateUrlDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    id: string;
}, UrlResult, z.ZodObject<{
    id: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
```
